name: faq-card
title: FAQ Card
description: A centered FAQ accordion wrapped in a card with an optional CTA, installed as a wired Payload block.

preview.summary: Centered FAQ accordion inside a bordered card with an optional CTA.

sampleContent.title: Frequently asked questions
sampleContent.description: The essentials on trials, billing, and support before you commit.

items.question: How does the free trial work?
items.answer: Start with a 14-day free trial with full access to every feature. No credit card required.

items.question: Is there a setup fee?
items.answer: No setup fees and no hidden costs — you only ever pay for your subscription plan.

items.question: Do you offer refunds?
items.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. Contact us within 30 days for a full refund.
